title: reel:generate-video args
description: Enqueue one or more per-scene video jobs to the workbench. Each video MUST bind to a scene (sceneId) — the workbench consumes the queue, runs its in-browser pipeline, and attaches the result to the scene timeline. The workbench must be open. Pass a single job inline, or many via `jobs`.

jobs.description: Batch: enqueue multiple scene videos in one call. Each item needs at least a sceneId.

sceneId.description: REQUIRED. The scene (key in scenario.scenes) this video binds to.

scenarioId.description: Optional target scenario id. Defaults to the workbench's active scenario.

prompt.description: Optional camera-language video prompt. Omit to fall back to the scene's own video prompt.

durationSec.description: Optional duration in seconds (3..12). Omit to use the scene duration / default 5s.

size.description: Optional resolution tier (seedanceResolution.VideoSize, e.g. 1080p/720p with orientation).

sceneId.description: Single-job: the scene (key in scenario.scenes) this video binds to. Required unless `jobs` is given.

scenarioId.description: Single-job: optional target scenario id. Defaults to the active scenario.

prompt.description: Single-job: optional camera-language video prompt. Omit to fall back to the scene's own video prompt.
